title: Spicy Velvety Irish Cookies Stir-fry
description: This dish combines crispy cookies with a velvety texture and a spicy kick for a brunch-time favorite that’s kosher-friendly.

ingredients.name: Spicy Sauce
ingredients.amount: 2 tablespoons hot sauce of choice (such as sriracha)

instructions: Melt coconut sugar in a small saucepan over medium heat until smooth. Remove from heat and add spicy sauce, stirring well.
Pour in heavy cream and stir continuously until mixture thickens slightly—about 2-3 minutes.
Carefully fold in vanilla extract and stir to combine. Keep warm while cooking cookies if needed for assembly.
Arrange 10-15 Irish Shortbread Cookies on a plate or platter lined with parchment paper.
Dip the bottoms of the cookies into the hot caramel sauce, pressing gently to ensure they’re fully coated. Serve immediately.
